description: This video discusses the limitations of traditional gaming, focusing on pay-to-win models, the inability to trade in-game assets, and the control gaming companies have over these assets.
topic_summary: Traditional gaming often restricts players from monetizing or trading in-game assets, which are typically controlled by the gaming companies. Blockchain technology has the potential to change this dynamic, but it is not universally implemented across all games. [t=0:88] [t=10:64] [t=29:14]
aliases: What Are the Limitations of Traditional Gaming
